message:
feat(io): add buffered reader/writer and copy utilities

Expand I/O adapter surface (was 4 API fns, now 13) matching upstream
io/ module families (buf_reader, buf_writer, copy):

Buffered reader (asx_buf_reader):
- Internal buffer that refills from inner read adapter
- read: serve from buffer or refill transparently
- read_line: scan for newline, strip \r\n, handle EOF-terminated lines
- is_eof: check if underlying stream exhausted

Buffered writer (asx_buf_writer):
- Internal buffer that flushes to inner write adapter
- write: buffer data, auto-flush when full, direct-write for oversized
- flush: push buffered data to inner adapter
- shutdown: flush + close underlying writer

Copy utilities:
- asx_io_copy: copy all data from reader to writer until EOF
- asx_io_copy_n: copy at most N bytes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
